import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut best = ""
  mut best_len = -1
  mut i = 0
  let n = words.len()
  while i < n
    let w = match words.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    let wl = string.len(w)
    if wl > best_len
      best = w
      best_len = wl
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("longest=#{best}")
  Ok(())
end
